name: Magic Dart
description: A bolt of pure magical force. Never misses.
cast_text: A shimmering dart of raw magic lances from your hand.

name: Searing Ray
description: A focused beam of energy that grows stronger each consecutive turn.
cast_text: A searing beam of energy erupts from your outstretched hand.

name: Freeze
description: A chilling touch that bypasses armour and slows the target.
cast_text: Hoarfrost crawls across your palm as you reach for the target.

name: Sting
description: A tiny barb that inflicts a stacking poison.
cast_text: A venomous needle streaks through the air.

name: Blink
description: Instantly teleport to a random visible tile.
cast_text: You fold space and step through a crack in reality.

name: Summon Small Mammal
description: Conjure a weak animal ally — rat, bat, or snake.
cast_text: You trace a summoning sigil; a small creature scurries into being.

name: Summon Canine Familiar
description: Call a loyal canine companion to fight beside you.
cast_text: A ghostly hound pads out of the ether and falls in beside you.

name: Ignite Flora
description: Set all visible plants, grass, and trees ablaze.
cast_text: Flame ripples outward, igniting every living stem in sight.

name: Flame Wave
description: An expanding ring of fire centered on the caster.
cast_text: You stomp the ground; a ring of fire erupts and races outward.

name: Fireball
description: An explosive fireball that detonates in a 3x3 cross.
cast_text: A roaring orb of flame detonates with a thunderous crack.

name: Petrify
description: Slow, then turn the target to stone for 5 turns.
cast_text: Grey stone creeps across the target's limbs, locking them in place.

name: Iron Shot
description: A massive chunk of iron. High damage, bypasses magic resistance.
cast_text: A dense sphere of black iron hurtles forward with crushing force.

name: Lehudib's Crystal Spear
description: The ultimate single-target spell. Virtually irresistible.
cast_text: A crystalline spear of devastating purity forms and flies true.

name: Ice Shard
description: A jagged shard of permafrost that slows whatever it pierces.
cast_text: A razor-sharp splinter of ice rips through the air.

name: Static Touch
description: A jolt of raw voltage channeled through the caster's palm. Leaves foes disoriented.
cast_text: Crackling electricity dances across your hand as you reach out.

name: Stone Fist
description: A clenched fist of granite that pummels a single foe from afar.
cast_text: A massive stone fist rockets forward to pulverise your enemy.

name: Venom Bolt
description: A sickly green bolt that soaks into flesh and festers from within.
cast_text: A putrid green bolt hisses through the air and sinks into its target.

name: Phase Shift
description: The caster briefly unmoors from reality and snaps back at a random visible position.
cast_text: Your form shimmers and unravels, then reknits elsewhere in the room.

name: Summon Spectral Wolf
description: Conjure a translucent lupine spirit that fights alongside you until dispelled.
cast_text: A spectral wolf howls into existence, its eyes burning with pale light.

name: Blizzard
description: A howling tempest of sleet and frost that slows everything it touches.
cast_text: Freezing gales swirl around you as a blizzard engulfs the area.

name: Chain Lightning
description: A branching arc of lightning that strikes the target and leaps to adjacent foes.
cast_text: A blinding fork of lightning arcs from your fingertips and branches wildly.
